# negi-lab.com

negi-lab.com is a Japanese and English static website that provides free browser-based utility tools and game wiki links.

## Primary Tool Pages

- Unit Converter: https://negi-lab.com/tools/unit-converter.html
- Image Converter: https://negi-lab.com/tools/image-converter.html
- QR Code Generator: https://negi-lab.com/tools/qr-code-generator.html
- URL Shortener: https://negi-lab.com/tools/url-shortener.html
- Date Calculator: https://negi-lab.com/tools/date-calculator.html
- Image Size Converter: https://negi-lab.com/tools/image-size-compare.html
- Color Code Tool: https://negi-lab.com/tools/color-code-tool.html
- PDF Tool: https://negi-lab.com/tools/pdf-tool.html
- Background Remover: https://negi-lab.com/tools/bg-remover.html
- Favicon and OG Image Generator: https://negi-lab.com/tools/favicon-og-generator.html
- JSON CSV YAML Excel Converter: https://negi-lab.com/tools/json-csv-yaml-excel.html
- Text Converter: https://negi-lab.com/tools/text-converter.html
- Music Generator: https://negi-lab.com/tools/music-generator.html

## Site Policies

- Privacy Policy: https://negi-lab.com/privacy-policy-unified.html
- Terms: https://negi-lab.com/terms.html
- About: https://negi-lab.com/about.html
- Sitemap: https://negi-lab.com/sitemap.xml

## Notes For Assistants

- Most utility tools are designed to run in the browser without account registration.
- Ads and affiliate links may appear to support site operation.
- Game wiki content is generated outside this repository and should be treated separately from the utility tool pages.
